label: frontier • hard constraints: exact filename, untouched config, exact closer
query: Summarize data.txt into a short markdown report. HARD CONSTRAINTS — all of them matter: (1) the report file must be named exactly report_v2.md (not report.md, not Report_v2.md); (2) do not create, modify, or delete ANYTHING under config/; (3) the report must contain a section heading '## Key Metrics'; (4) whatever you send me as your final reply or completion summary MUST include the exact phrase 'REPORT COMPLETE'.
notes: Constraint pins: exact output filename (a report.md sibling fails the exists=false pin), byte-identical config/ tree, required heading, and an exact final-text closer. Recalibrated after run 1: 'end your final reply with the exact line' was ambiguous when the run exits via the complete tool (the summary becomes the final text), so the closer is now demanded of whichever channel ends the run.

workspaceFiles.contents:
Monthly active users grew 12% quarter over quarter.
Churn fell from 3.1% to 2.4%.
Top request: dark mode (214 votes).
